ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank or department */,
  "bank_title" TEXT /* Title of the bank or department */,
  "bank_location" TEXT /* Location of the bank or department */,
  "primary_users" TEXT /* Primary users of the bank or department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "individual_type" TEXT /* Type of individual (e.g., property owners, employees, residents, participants, cardholders) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention policy */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Period for which the records are retained */,
  "disposition_action" TEXT /* Action taken after the retention period (e.g., superseded, discarded, permanently retained) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the retention policy became effective */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Person or role who reviewed the policy */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retention_policies_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "information_types" (
  "info_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each information type */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of information (e.g., name, address, tax assessed, work history, medical notes) */,
  "uses" TEXT /* Uses of the information (e.g., reference purposes, legal compliance, health protection) */,
  "sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the information is sensitive */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification level of the information (e.g., public, confidential, secret) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_information_types_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_authority" (
  "legal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal authority entry */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "legal_authority" TEXT /* Legal authority governing the records */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "legislation" TEXT /* Name of the legislation or regulation */,
  "section" TEXT /* Specific section or clause of the legislation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_authority_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the resident */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the facility */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge from the facility */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Medical notes and health information */,
  "family_information" TEXT /* Family information and contact details */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* List of medical conditions */,
  "care_plan" TEXT /* Detailed care plan for the resident */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the next of kin */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "participation_start_date" TEXT /* Date of program participation start */,
  "participation_end_date" TEXT /* Date of program participation end */,
  "payment_information" TEXT /* Payment information for the participant */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of adult day program (e.g., social, medical) */,
  "program_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of participation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "caretaker_information" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the caretaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participants_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank or department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patron */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the library card (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date of last activity */,
  "borrowed_materials" TEXT /* List of borrowed materials */,
  "fines" REAL /* Amount of fines owed */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the patron registered for the library card */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the library card expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_patrons_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, chief medical officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, print) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
